description: Letter from Shemuel b. Yehuda ha-Bavli, in Alexandria, to a notable, in Fustat. Mainly in Judaeo-Arabic. Dating: ca. 1130s CE. Concerning the withholding of money and books belonging to him. See also T-S 16.301 (PGPID 1733). Reused on verso for Hebrew jottings in a rudimentary hand related to the parshiyot.
